mermaidSyntax:
gantt
    title 24-Month Multi-Site Clinical Study Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM
    axisFormat %b
    
    section Phase 1 - Preparation
    IRB Approval              :p1, 2024-01, 2M
    Site Selection & Training :p2, 2024-02, 2M
    Database Setup            :p3, 2024-03, 2M
    
    section Phase 2 - Enrollment
    Site 1 Enrollment         :e1, 2024-04, 4M
    Site 2 Enrollment         :e2, 2024-05, 5M
    Site 3 Enrollment         :e3, 2024-06, 6M
    
    section Phase 3 - Treatment
    Treatment Period          :t1, 2024-08, 8M
    3-Month Follow-up         :f1, 2025-04, 4M
    
    section Phase 4 - Analysis
    Data Lock                 :milestone, d1, 2025-06, 0d
    Statistical Analysis      :a1, 2025-06, 3M
    Manuscript Preparation    :a2, 2025-09, 2M
    Submission                :milestone, sub, 2025-12, 0d
    
    section Milestones
    DSMB Review 1 (M8)        :milestone, m1, 2024-08, 0d
    DSMB Review 2 (M12)       :milestone, m2, 2024-12, 0d
    DSMB Review 3 (M16)       :milestone, m3, 2025-04, 0d
